_comment: NAVCOM archive manifest — one entry per issue. Used by scripts/import-navcom-archive.ts to seed Sanity. Re-runs are idempotent (matched by slug or pdfUrl). The 'sections' array references newsletterSection slugs in Sanity; create those documents first (or omit the field).

_example.title: NAVCOM — June 2025
_example.excerpt: Pancake breakfast recap, Young Eagles rally photos, and June presenter spotlight.

issues.title: NAVCOM — Latest issue
issues.excerpt: The most recent NAVCOM issue published on the chapter site. Update this entry once you import the full Drive archive.
